creator: dchagin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #4)

MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS != NO_KERNEL_SYMBOLS
and, s/NO/MK/ does not help, anyway:

dchagin@chd:/home/git/nvidia-driver-340 % make -V MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS

dchagin@chd:/home/git/nvidia-driver-340 %

MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS uninitialized
